skill.simple.cold_resistance.desc: Hardens the body against cold and unlocks deeper sensory growth.
skill.simple.cold_resistance.name: Cold Resistance
skill.simple.great_sage.desc: A unique analytical skill that crowns a disciplined passive build.
skill.simple.great_sage.name: Great Sage
skill.simple.heat_resistance.desc: Reduces the burden of heat and marks the start of bodily adaptation.
skill.simple.heat_resistance.name: Heat Resistance
skill.simple.magic_sense.desc: Extends awareness beyond sight and reacts to hidden presences.
skill.simple.magic_sense.name: Magic Sense
skill.simple.pain_nullification.desc: Suppresses pain feedback so the body can act without hesitation.
skill.simple.pain_nullification.name: Pain Nullification
skill.simple.poison_resistance.desc: Improves resilience against toxins and unstable foreign effects.
skill.simple.poison_resistance.name: Poison Resistance
skill.simple.self_regeneration.desc: Accelerates natural recovery and stabilizes damaged flesh.
skill.simple.self_regeneration.name: Self-Regeneration
skill.simple.steel_body.desc: Turns the body into a tougher vessel built for impact and endurance.
skill.simple.steel_body.name: Steel Body
